//: /flow DECOMPOSE-stage doc scaffold — specs/<slug>/03-tasks.json. Externalized from the legacy /spec:decompose output so the DECOMPOSE/SPECIFY stage skills carry no inline template. This is the canonical 03-tasks.json scaffold of the /flow doc-template set (templates/docs/). Replace this comment key and the example task below. The per-task `issue` field is the canonical home for the tracker identifier a sub-issue is promoted into (written via the linear-adapter, never authored here).

tasks.subject: [<slug>] [P1] <imperative task subject>
tasks.description: <what to build and the acceptance criteria for this task>
